response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry/junior-level position, creating a severe seniority mismatch. While technical skills align well (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, databases), hiring a Staff Engineer into a junior role typically leads to compensation conflicts, boredom, flight risk, and team dynamic issues. No demonstrated experience in renewable energy or construction tech domains. Berlin location matches the on-site requirement.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS/Kubernetes background exceeds technical requirements
Berlin-based, satisfying the high on-site presence requirement
Demonstrated full-stack breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps infrastructure
concerns: Massive seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role signals high flight risk and compensation misalignment
No domain experience in renewable energy, construction tech, or energy consulting workflows
Only basic German listed, which may limit collaboration in a German on-site team serving local construction/energy markets
